title: Bitcoin Miner Bitdeer Increases BTC Holdings by 75%
text: Bitcoin miner Bitdeer increased its BTC holdings by 75% to 1,039 BTC in two months according to SEC filings. The company demonstrated commitment to accumulating Bitcoin for its corporate treasury. Bitdeer started 2025 with significant holdings and expanded its position as part of a broader strategy to benefit from Bitcoin appreciation. However, this trajectory changed in 2026, when Bitdeer subsequently liquidated its entire Bitcoin treasury in February. The company started 2026 holding roughly 2,000 BTC but sold all holdings by mid-February. Company leadership indicated the decision reflects liquidity management needs for funding data centers, AI cloud expansion, and mining hardware purchases rather than a loss of confidence in Bitcoin. CEO Jihan Wu clarified that zero-Bitcoin balance does not necessarily mean permanent liquidation, stating the company is evaluating multiple powered land acquisition opportunities.
